title: Risk Analyst
description:
Fidelity manages $11 trillion in customer assets. We're a leading provider of financial services, retirement solutions, and investment management.

We're seeking a Risk Analyst to join our Asset Management team in Columbus. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Assess financial and operational risks across investment portfolios and business operations
Develop risk models and perform scenario analysis to quantify exposure
Monitor key risk indicators and report findings to management
Recommend risk mitigation strategies and control enhancements
Maintain risk documentation and ensure regulatory compliance
Collaborate with business units to embed risk management in decision-making

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Mathematics, or related field; MBA preferred
requirements.experience_years: 2-4 years in risk management, financial analysis, or internal audit
